message:
fix(raptorq): Fix LDPC constraint matrix to match RFC 6330 (bd-uix9)

Remove spurious PI column connections from LDPC rows that caused
matrix singularity for certain K values (e.g. K=20 with S=7, H=5).
Per RFC 6330 Section 5.3.3.3, LDPC rows only have circulant connections
to source symbols plus an identity block for check symbols — no PI
column entries. This makes the overall constraint matrix lower
block-triangular (LT → LDPC → HDPC) with identity diagonal blocks,
guaranteeing non-singularity for all K values.

Also fix test that incorrectly expected seed-dependent intermediate
symbols (intermediates depend only on the constraint matrix and source
data; only repair symbols vary with seed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
